threeStar.name: Castorice
threeStar.passive: When defending: If DMG taken is no less than 8, increases ATK Level and DEF Level by 1. If DMG taken is no more than 5, immediately deals 3 Instant Damage. Attack/Defense Level: The required number of dice that must be selected for attack/defense. Instant Damage: Deals damage instantly, skipping the calculation of Final DMG.

threeStar.name: Acheron
threeStar.passive: When attacking: If all selected dice numbers are 4, this attack gains Perforation: for each successful Perforation triggered, increases ATK Level by 1. Perforation: When attacking, ignores the opponent's Defense and Forcefield. Attack Level: The required number of dice that must be selected for attack.

threeStar.name: Firefly
threeStar.passive: When attacking, If the selected dice contain 2 pairs of matching numbers, this attack gains Combo. If this unit has full HP, increases Attack by 5. Combo: Performs 1 additional attack based on the current Attack.

threeStar.name: Robin
threeStar.passive: When attacking: If all selected dice are even numbers, the selected dice gain a Level Up. Level Up: Upgrades eligible dice by increasing their Rarity and max number of faces up to twelve. Note: The d12 dice are treated as Prismatic Dice.

threeStar.name: The Herta
threeStar.passive: At the end of the turn: Gains 1 Prismatic Dice Use. If its special effect has been triggered more than 4 times, subsequently gains Arise each turn. Arise: Before the end of the turn, randomly turns the selected die with the lowest value to that die's maximum value. (Prismatic Dice are unaffected)

threeStar.name: Kafka
threeStar.passive: When attacking: For each different number on the selected dice, applies 1 stack of Poison. When defense fails, removes 1 stack of Poison from the opponent. Poison: At the end of the turn, takes DMG based on the number of stacks, then reduce the number of stacks by 1.

threeStar.name: Aventurine
threeStar.passive: When attacking: Gains 1 stack of Toughness for every 1 odd number in the selected dice. When Toughness accumulates to 7 stacks, immediately deals 7 Instant Damage and removes 7 stacks of Toughness. Toughness: When defending, provides a DEF bonus based on the number of stacks. Instant Damage: Deals damage instantly, skipping the calculation of Final DMG.

threeStar.name: March 7th
threeStar.passive: When attacking or defending: For each 1 pair of matching numbers on selected dice, deals 3 Instant Damage. Instant Damage: Deals damage instantly, skipping the calculation of Final DMG.

threeStar.name: Dan Heng
threeStar.passive: When attacking: If Attack is no less than 18, next time when defending, increases DEF Level by 3, and gains Counter. After defense ends, DEF Level will be restored to the initial value. Defense Level: The required number of dice that must be selected for defense. Counter: When attacked, if your DEF is higher, deals DMG to the attacker equal to the difference.

threeStar.name: Sparxie
threeStar.passive: When attacking or defending: If the selected dice include identical numbers, gains Hack. Hack: Before the end of the turn, turns your opponent's selected die with the highest value into a 2. (Prismatic Dice are unaffected)

threeStar.name: Yao Guang
threeStar.passive: When attacking: Gain 4 reroll attempts; after exceeding 2 rerolls in a single turn, each reroll grants 2 stacks of Thorns. Additionally, if Attack is no less than 18, removes all Thorns and gains 1 Prismatic Dice use. Thorns: Before the end of the turn, takes DMG based on the number of stacks. This effect is removed at the end of the turn.

threeStar.name: Cyrene
threeStar.passive: This unit's ATK and DEF values are tallied each turn. When the total exceeds 24, Attack Level becomes 5, and subsequently gains Arise each turn. Attack Level: The required number of dice that must be selected for attack. Arise: Before the end of the turn, randomly turns the selected die with the lowest value to that die's maximum value. (Prismatic Dice are unaffected)

threeStar.name: Phainon
threeStar.passive: When attacking: Siphons HP equal to 50% of the DMG dealt. When defending: If all selected dice have the same number, gains Unyielding, which can be triggered up to 1 time. Siphon: When attacking, restores HP equal to a portion of the DMG dealt. Unyielding: While active, always keeps 1 HP.

threeStar.name: Hyacine
threeStar.passive: After attacking: Sets Strength stacks to 50% of this attack's value. If all selected dice numbers are 6, sets it to 100% and Heals 6 HP. Strength: When attacking, provides an ATK bonus based on the number of stacks. Heal: Restores a specified amount of HP.

twoStar.name: Chimera
twoStar.passive: When attacking: If the selected dice show the same number, increases Attack by 3. If that number is 4, increases Attack by 7 instead.

twoStar.name: Dromas
twoStar.passive: When attacking: If all the selected dice show even numbers, inflicts 2 stacks of Poison on the opponent. This effect can stack. Poison: At the end of the turn, takes DMG based on the number of stacks, then reduce the number of stacks by 1.

twoStar.name: Automaton Beetle
twoStar.passive: When defending: Gains 1 reroll attempt. If the selected dice include 3 consecutive numbers, also gains Forcefield this turn and 8 stacks of Strength for use next turn. Forcefield: While active, takes no DMG from general attacks. Strength: When attacking, provides an ATK bonus based on the number of stacks.

twoStar.name: Trashcan
twoStar.passive: After attacking: Gains 2 stack(s) of Strength. If all the selected dice show even numbers, gains 4 stack(s) of Strength instead. Strength: When attacking, provides an ATK bonus based on the number of stacks.

twoStar.name: Trashcan 2star
twoStar.passive: After attacking: Gains 2 stack(s) of Strength. If all the selected dice show even numbers, gains 4 stack(s) of Strength instead. Strength: When attacking, provides an ATK bonus based on the number of stacks.

twoStar.name: Furbo Journalist
twoStar.passive: When defending: When taking damage, immediately deals 2 Instant Damage. If all the dice selected for this defense show odd numbers, deals 4 Instant Damage instead. Instant Damage: Deals damage instantly, skipping the calculation of Final DMG.

twoStar.name: BananAdvisor
twoStar.passive: When defending: Gains 1 reroll attempt(s). If no DMG is taken after finalization, heals this unit for 5 HP. Once only: If HP is 5 or less at the end of the turn, Defense Level increases by 1. Heal: Restores a specified amount of HP. Defense Level: The required number of dice that must be selected for defense.

twoStar.name: Senior Staff
twoStar.passive: When attacking: For each different number on selected dice, increases Attack by 1. When defending: For each different number on selected dice, increases Defense by 1.
